name: Metabase
description: An open-source business intelligence tool that lets anyone in your team ask questions about your data and display answers as charts, dashboards and automated reports — no SQL required.

aws.parity: Metabase connects to the same data sources as QuickSight (RDS, Redshift, Athena) — validate your dashboards locally before publishing to QuickSight.
aws.deploy: Configure QuickSight datasets pointing at your production data sources and recreate your dashboards using its visual editor.

variables.label: Web Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Metabase web UI.
